Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: dresses by form [300221275], dresses (garments) [300046159], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Sleeveless dresses or skirts with straps and a partial or full bodice, usually worn over a shirt or blouse by women and children.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Vestido sin mangas o falda con tirantes y cuerpo completo o parcial, que generalmente es llevado por mujeres y niños sobre una camisa o blusa.
Mouwloze japonnen of rokken met banden en een gedeeltelijk of compleet lijfje, doorgaans over een ander kledingstuk, b.v. een trui of een blouse, gedragen door vrouwen en kinderen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000099312/Brooks-Picken, M., A Dictionary of Costume and Fashion. Historic and Modern. (New York 1999)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Ärmelloses Kleid oder Rock mit Trägern und einem Mieder oder Teilmieder, das in der Regel über einem Shirt oder einer Bluse von Frauen und Kindern getragen wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
2000051231/The Oxford- Duden Pictorial Spanish and English Dictionary (1995)

Term_Source.Page: Term suggested by Valerie Mendes and Avril Hart, V & A Residency 3/93.

Source.Source_ID: 2000099312/Brooks-Picken, M., A Dictionary of Costume and Fashion. Historic and Modern. (New York 1999)
